title: Sharing a Monday board with a different workspace

posts.author: jpo100 (John)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

I’m trying to share a Monday board with a different workspace and can’t seem to find what I need. Here’s the situation:

We have multiple workspaces, each representing a department in our organisation, such as Tech, Marketing, and Ops.

We use a standard Monday board template for projects, and each department uses this template to track and monitor any projects they have in flight. This keeps things consistent and works well, and these boards live within their own workspaces, as you’d expect.

We have a Projects Committee that meets weekly to review all projects across all departments.

We’d want to create an area (workspace?) where the Projects Committee can view all the project boards that each department currently has in-flight - in one place.

In my mind, the ideal solution would be to share a board as ‘read-only’ with a different workspace, but I can’t find anything along these lines.

The mirror column solution seems far too complicated for this and doesn’t really do what I need.

Am I missing something? Is there a way to do this?

Thank you!

posts.author: mark.anley (Green Llamas Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @jpo100 - the easiest solution would be to create a dashboard, then use the table widget to pull in the project boards (into a single or multiple widgets).

Hope this helps!
Mark
